# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

```
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: bookinfo
spec:
  host: productpage.default.svc.cluster.local
  subsets:
  - name: v1
    labels:
      version: v1

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-svc
spec:
  hosts:
  - external-svc.default.svc.cluster.local
  ports:
  - number: 80
    name: http
    protocol: HTTP
  locations:
  - prefix: /externalsvc/default/svc/external-svc

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-svc70
spec:
  hosts:
  - external-svc70.default.svc.cluster.local
  ports:
  - number: 80
    name: http
    protocol: HTTP
  locations:
  - prefix: /externalsvc/default/svc/external-svc70

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-svc71
spec:
  hosts:
  - external-svc71.default.svc.cluster.local
  ports:
  - number: 80
    name: http
    protocol: HTTP
  locations:
  - prefix: /externalsvc/default/svc/external-svc71

---
